verse_text: But He put them all outside, atook her by the hand and called, saying, 'Little girl, arise.'

pericope.title: Jairus' Daughter Raised, a Woman Healed

links.context: This passage and [[1CO.9:5]] (where Peter is called Cephas) indicate Peter was married. Our Lord's healing miracles are diverse. In this case, He heals by touch; in v. 13, He healed by a word. This healing is immediate and complete; others are gradual (Mk 8:22-25) or require the cooperation of the person healed or of his loved ones ([[LUK.8:54]], 55). As the quotation in v. 17 indicates, all of Christ's miracles manifest His redemption of ailing humanity.
